About.heading: International perspective.
About.description: Clinical experience shaped within institutions that defined modern surgical standards.
About.tagline: Global exposure. European standards. Personal attention.

Patients.description: You don't need translation. You don't need confusion. You need a physician who understands both medicine and your language.
Patients.languages: Consultations in fluent English and Greek.

steps.title: Evidence-based assessment
steps.desc: Grounded in current surgical evidence, not outdated protocols.

steps.title: Modern surgical reasoning
steps.desc: Contemporary thinking that reflects the latest standards.

steps.title: Transparent discussion
steps.desc: Open conversation about options, risks, and outcomes.

steps.title: Conservative when appropriate
steps.desc: Non-operative management when it's the right path.

steps.title: Precise when necessary
steps.desc: Surgical intervention executed with care and precision.

Academic.description: Surgery is not learned from textbooks alone. Dr. Pakataridis is a Surgical Simulation Educator and active researcher.
organizations: Society of American Gastrointestinal and Endoscopic Surgeons
Academic.sidebarQuote: You will not get shortcuts. You will get structure.

Philosophy.heading: The Philosophy
Philosophy.description: Modern surgery is not only about operating. It is about:
Philosophy.mergeQuote: And knowing when not to operate.
